md:
!tit two balls in a narrow box
!descr Two heavy balls each in a box, one with 1000 balls the other with double. We use a very slow speed to stay in Stokes regime. 

# Abstract

Testing the Stokes regime

# Introduction 

We want to test if increasing the density leads to  an enhanced decrease in speed. 

# Description 

We use two boxes, two heavy balls (500 u.a) with slow speed (10 u.a).

# Results 

The two balls even if not in a bath of particle with the same density lose speed at quasi the same rate.
descr: Two heavy balls each in a box, one with 1000 balls the other with double. We use a very slow speed to stay in Stokes regime.
